title: Acrylic Paint Pens, 80 Colors Dual Tip Acrylic Markers Paint Pens, Strong Coverage for Paint Rocks, Glass, Wood, Fabric, Paper, Colouring Book, DIY Crafts Art Supplies
features: Dual Tip Acrylic Paint Pens: Kitire acrylic paint markers brush tip with fine tip and brush tip. 1mm fine tip for highlights, drawing, outlining, sketching and general writing and a 1-5mm brush tip for quickly color in large areas. Dual tip paint colouring pens design meets different coloring needs. Note: Please tighten acrylic pens cap after use

80 Vibrant Colors& Versatile: The acrylic markers offers 80 vibrant colors, suitable for adults, beginners and professional to creative projects, such as rocks or easter eggs for painting, making DIY crafts, fabric pens can be used on surfaces like canvas, paper, wood, plastic paints, metal, glass painting, fabric, on special festivals such as Halloween, Christmas, Easter

Strong Coverage and Non-bleed : Acrylic paint pens marker for painting, colouring support multi-layer colour application and Non-Penetrating. When imperfections occur during the painting process, a light coverage with colored markers will restore the image toperfection, a saviour for beginners, professional painters and craft enthusiasts

Fast-drying and Fade-Resistant: Permanent acrylic paint set with cotton nib for even ink output and upgraded acrylics to ensure vibrant, waterproof, fast-drying, nonfading colours to keep your artwork vividand aesthetically pleasing. Drying time may vary depending on the surface

Portable Design: The acrylic pens fabric paintpaint set comes with a black carrying bag for easy to carry. Due to its portability, you can use the new painting kit anywhere and anytime. Whether indoors or outdoors, and unleash your creativity whenever inspiration strikes

Color-Coded Caps: The improved cap fits brush acrylic paint pens set better and reduces inkevaporation. And each colouring pens with colour markings for easy identification and organisation, making it easy to choose the exact colour every time.
